summary: Iteration 21: Push Notifications and Abbonamenti Grid Layout Testing - All features verified working. Push notification endpoints (VAPID key, subscribe, send-reminders) all functional. Abbonamenti & Card section in public booking modal displays 6 items in 2-column grid with correct prices (€60, €40, €75, €65, €50, €100). Card selection works with purple border highlight. Admin Planning page working correctly after refactoring.
passed_tests: 4. POST /api/push/send-reminders works (sent 0, failed 2 for test subscriptions) - PASS
8. Card templates have expected prices (€60, €40, €75, €65, €50, €100) - PASS
9. Card templates have required fields (id, name, total_value) - PASS
10. Services sorted by sort_order ascending - PASS
14. Public booking modal opens correctly - PASS
15. Abbonamenti & Card accordion at TOP of modal - PASS
16. 6 card templates displayed in 2-column grid - PASS
18. Card selection highlights with purple border - PASS
19. Selected card badge appears when card selected - PASS
20. Admin Planning page loads correctly - PASS
21. Planning page shows appointment grid with operators - PASS
22. Planning page has Nuovo button, view controls (Giorno/Settimana/Mese) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification implementation is complete with VAPID keys configured in backend/.env
Service worker (sw-push.js) properly handles push events and notification clicks
Frontend pushNotifications.js utility correctly registers service worker and subscribes to push
BookingModal.jsx correctly displays card templates in 2-column grid (lines 381-419)
Card templates use purple color scheme (#A855F7) matching admin layout
seed_data_creation: Test push subscription created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified: Push notifications fully implemented (VAPID keys, service worker, backend scheduler). Abbonamenti section in public booking modal now matches admin layout with 2-column grid. All 6 card templates display with correct prices. Card selection works with purple highlight. Admin Planning page working correctly. No issues found.

push_notifications.send_reminders_endpoint: POST /api/push/send-reminders sends notifications for upcoming appointments
push_notifications.service_worker: sw-push.js handles push events and notification clicks
push_notifications.frontend_utility: pushNotifications.js registers SW and subscribes after booking

abbonamenti_grid_layout.location: At TOP of public booking modal (before Promozioni)
abbonamenti_grid_layout.badge: Selected card badge appears below accordion
